name: cc2codex-migration-assistant
description: Codex-native wrapper for guiding Claude Code to Codex migrations with the cc2codex CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Guide a staged Claude Code to Codex migration using cc2codex.
interface.longDescription: Uses the cc2codex CLI to assess readiness, run a safe trial migration, explain behavior changes, and guide live cutover with confirmations.
defaultPrompt: Assess my Claude setup and recommend a staged Codex migration.
Run a safe trial migration into /tmp before touching ~/.codex.
Explain what changes in Codex for my hooks, skills, and MCP servers.
